# cloud_azure corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Azure / Storage ===
# expect: Azure Storage Connection String
# expect: Azure Storage SAS Token
DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=demostorage;AccountKey=AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz0123456789AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz0123456789AbCdEfGhIjKlMn==
?sv=2022-11-02&ss=b&srt=co&sp=rwdlac&se=2025-01-01&sig=AbCdEf0123ZzZz%2FExampleSig

# === Azure / Service Bus ===
# expect: Azure Service Bus Connection String
Endpoint=sb://demo-ns.servicebus.windows.net/;SharedAccessKeyName=RootManageSharedAccessKey;SharedAccessKey=AbCdEf0123456789ExampleKeyValue=

# === Azure / Cosmos DB ===
# expect: Azure Cosmos DB Connection String
# expect: Azure Cosmos DB Account Endpoint
AccountEndpoint=https://demo-acct.documents.azure.com:443/;AccountKey=AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz0123456789AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz0123456789AbCdEfGhIjKlMn==
https://demo-acct.documents.azure.com:443/

# === Azure / Key Vault ===
# expect: Azure Key Vault Secret URI
https://my-vault.vault.azure.net/secrets/dbpassword/0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

# === Azure / App Configuration ===
# expect: Azure App Configuration Connection String
Endpoint=https://demo-config.azconfig.io;Id=abc-l9-s0:ExampleId;Secret=AbCdEf0123456789ExampleSecretValue=

# === Azure / Functions ===
# expect: Azure Functions URL with Code
https://demo-app.azurewebsites.net/api/myfunc?code=AbCdEf0123456789ExampleFunctionCode==

# === Azure / SQL ===
# expect: Azure SQL Connection String
Server=tcp:demo-srv.database.windows.net,1433;Database=mydb;UserID=admin;Password=Example_P4ss;

# === Azure / App Service ===
# expect: Azure App Service Publish Profile Password
<publishProfile profileName="demo" userName="$demo" userPWD="AbCdEf0123456789Example">

# === Azure / Application Insights ===
# expect: Azure Application Insights Connection String
# expect: Azure Application Insights Instrumentation Key
InstrumentationKey=12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012;IngestionEndpoint=https://eastus.in.applicationinsights.azure.com/
InstrumentationKey=abcdef01-2345-6789-abcd-ef0123456789

# === Azure / Entra ID ===
# expect: Azure Entra App Client Secret
# expect: Azure Tenant via login.microsoftonline.com
# expect: Azure Managed Identity Issuer
secret Ab18Q~CCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCC here
https://login.microsoftonline.com/22223333-cccc-4444-dddd-5555eeee6666
https://sts.windows.net/aaaa0a0a-bb1b-cc2c-dd3d-eeeeee4e4e4e
